recommendations.title: The Well
recommendations.overview: A young restorer travels to a small village to restore a medieval painting to its former glory. She will put her life in danger due to a curse attached to the painting.

recommendations.title: The Flyboys
recommendations.overview: Two boys from a small town find their courage tested when they accidentally stow away aboard an airplane owned by the mob...

recommendations.title: S.M.A.R.T. Chase
recommendations.overview: A washed-up private security agent has to escort a valuable Chinese antique out of Shanghai but is ambushed en route.

recommendations.title: The Great Spy Chase
recommendations.overview: A cold-war spy parody. After the death of an armaments manufacturer, an international group of spies is drawn into a high-stakes battle of wits to obtain the valuable military patents which have been inherited by the lovely widow.

recommendations.title: Anamorph
recommendations.overview: A detective must solve the case of a serial killer who enacts anamorphosis, a painting technique that manipulates the laws of perspective, only with human bodies.

recommendations.title: Fight or Flight
recommendations.overview: A mercenary takes on the job of tracking down a target on a plane but must protect that target when they're surrounded by people trying to kill both of them.

recommendations.title: Female Prisoner #701: Scorpion
recommendations.overview: After being cruelly set up and deceived by Sugimi, a detective in cahoots with the mob with whom she was whole-heartedly in love, Matsushima’s desire for revenge knows no bounds.

recommendations.title: Heart of Stone
recommendations.overview: An intelligence operative for a shadowy global peacekeeping agency races to stop a hacker from stealing its most valuable — and dangerous — weapon.

recommendations.title: Give 'em Hell, Malone
recommendations.overview: A tough as nails private investigator (Malone) squares off with gangsters and their thugs to protect a valuable secret. Malone goes through hell to protect the information but he dishes some hell as well...

recommendations.title: 6 Bullets
recommendations.overview: An ex-mercenary known for finding missing children is hired by a mixed martial arts fighter whose daughter has been kidnapped.
